title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 107.050 - Discharge of former sureties
text:
107.050.  Discharge of former sureties. — When the additional bond is given and approved, the former sureties shall thereby be discharged from any misconduct of the principal after the approval of said bond.
(RSMo 1939 § 3237) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 2850; 1919 § 1001; 1909 § 1208
